ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 case */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region where the case occurred */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the case was reported */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive COVID-19 test results */,
  "recovered_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients who have recovered from COVID-19 */,
  "deceased_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients who have died from COVID-19 */,
  "case_source" TEXT /* Source of the case information (e.g., hospital, clinic, self-report) */,
  "contact_tracing_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for contact tracing records */,
  "vaccine_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  "is_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is hospitalized */,
  "hospital_id" TEXT /* ID of the hospital where the patient is treated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_iso_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_code") REFERENCES regions ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case being accessed */,
  "access_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case associated with the report */,
  "report_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES case_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of case data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case associated with the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., age, gender, symptoms) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the additional data (e.g., hospital records, patient self-report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case associated with the symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom first appeared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_symptom_name FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_name") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case associated with the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, twice a week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatments_treatment_name FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_name") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_treatments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the COVID-19 case associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the outcome (e.g., cause of death) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_outcome_type FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_type") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
